panel.heading: Somnia macro agent
panel.provenanceAriaLabel: Somnia testnet · agent macro print (POC) · recorded

cornerstone.idleHeading: Pick an example or describe your macro view
cornerstone.idleBody: Each example replays a recorded, consensus-verified Somnia decision. Your text maps to the nearest example; it is not inferred live.
cornerstone.mockSubLabelAria: State: mock — not live. Illustrative data, not inferred in real time.
cornerstone.errorState: We couldn't load the recorded decision. Retry or pick another example.
cornerstone.chip1Label: Colombian inflation surprised to the upside — how do I hedge?
cornerstone.chip1Caption: Curated examples · each replays a recorded, consensus-verified run.
cornerstone.chip2Label: Inflation is cooling — should I reduce the hedge?
cornerstone.chip2Caption: Curated examples · each replays a recorded, consensus-verified run.
cornerstone.forkVerifiedAriaLabel: Source: fork-verified — Agent 2 decision on representative pool; not deployed on-chain.
cornerstone.replayingMockAria: State: replaying mock — simulated agent run; no live inference.

live.disclosureEs: El Agente 1 corre en vivo sobre la testnet de Somnia; el Agente 2 acuña sobre un fork de Polygon alojado (BuildBear) — el mandato lo transporta esta app entre ellos; en esta demo NO hay puente entre cadenas.
live.disclosureEn: Agent 1 runs live on Somnia testnet; Agent 2 mints on a hosted Polygon fork (BuildBear) — the hedge mandate is carried between them by this app; there is NO cross-chain bridge in this demo.
live.txStateSubmitting: Submitting transaction — confirm in your wallet...
live.txStateReverted: Transaction reverted. Continuing in demo mode.
live.txStateError: Error submitting transaction. Continuing in demo mode.
live.txStateCancelled: Transaction cancelled. Continuing in demo mode.
live.evidenceBackRefDisclosure: On a hosted Polygon fork (BuildBear) — no bridge.
live.costPanelBodyEs: Implementada on-chain (OperationalCostManagement) — no desplegada para esta demo.
live.costPanelBodyEn: Implemented on-chain — not deployed for this demo.
live.costPanelAriaLabel: Agent cost accounting — not available in this demo
live.gateNoWalletAdvisory: A wallet with fork gas is needed to mint live.
live.gateSwitchChainAdvisory: Switch to the Polygon fork network (chainId 31337) to mint live.
live.narrativeConstantStrike: PKE strike is constant: 360360 — only targetNotional varies.
